incident_description: Consultant session revenue-share needs recalibration post VAT change for January clinics. Request Finance to update settlement sheets this week.
Diet slip notes G6PD + seafood allergy for bed 12, but lunch tray arrived with dried sprats curry. Please recall and replace; update allergy flag on the diet ticket.
Large crowd surged at OPD entrance when tokens opened; please deploy security to manage queue, verify NICs, and keep doors clear.
ICU AHU-2 not holding 22C; temp fluctuating 24–26C and alarms frequent. Please check chilled water valve/actuator before rounds.
Public holiday OT for our ward isn’t appearing in HRMIS; 6 nurses may miss payment. Please open the 1 Jan roster and accept manual OT entries today.
Porter team late to move prepped patient from Surgical Ward 3A to OT; anaesthesia set-up waiting. Request immediate trolley transfer and lift booking.
OPD token display is out of sync with HIS; looks like the display controller time is drifting and calls wrong ticket order.

New Year crowd formed a mixed queue at the main entrance; patients and visitors lined up together and blocked wheelchair access. Request reception to open a second OPD registration counter and announce token numbers over PA.
10 ml syringes are out in Paeds since morning rounds; IV meds delayed. Request urgent redistribution and raise immediate PO—weekend usage not reflected on bin card.
Patient vomited on chair and floor in OPD waiting area; request biohazard clean-up, chair wipe-down, and disinfection around ticket counter.
HMS still charging 15% VAT for lab panels this morning; new 18% rate effective today. Need Finance to correct bills already printed and issue adjusted tax invoices.
New neonatal infusion pumps delivered to NICU; require acceptance testing, electrical safety check, and calibration before use.
Imported meds showing VAT 18% plus SSCL 2.5% added incorrectly to tax base. Please review pricing template and reprint affected invoices before EOD.
Spot audit in Paediatric Ward showed hand hygiene compliance at 42%; several sinks lacked paper towels and one ABHR dispenser empty. Request QA-led corrective action and re-education.
Two new HOs reported but no IDs/biometric access yet; they can’t log into OPD system or drug charting. Kindly expedite onboarding.
Theatre 2 negative pressure not maintaining; door closer misaligned and pressure drops when door shuts. Need urgent HVAC/door seal review.
Vaccine fridge data logger batteries (CR2032) are dead; cannot record temps. Need immediate supply to avoid cold chain documentation gap.
Adrenaline ampoules supplied are short-dated (expiring next month). ETU policy needs >6 months shelf life—request immediate swap with vendor.
PACS cannot retrieve prior CT studies; DICOM C-FIND works but C-MOVE fails from archive before the evening list.
MRI room RF-door interlock intermittently fails and aborted two scans; request urgent inspection of door switch and shielding continuity.
After the brief morning rain, two red rice sacks near the loading bay feel damp at the base. Request inspection, segregation, and moisture log entry before use.
Light morning rain soaked foyer mats and left water pooling near main entrance; please mop, replace with dry mats, and place wet-floor signs.
Light rain made ambulance bay slick; crew needs anti-slip mats and two extra hands to load a non-ambulant OPD patient safely.
Parent reports phone missing from waiting area; request security to review CCTV near Play Corner and check exit logs.
Portable suction unit in ETU loses vacuum after 2 minutes; started after morning drizzle, possible moisture ingress in tubing or canister seals.
HIS sessions in ETU drop every few minutes since the light rain; link to the ETU switch is intermittently unreachable, slowing triage.
Light rain brought water into the main foyer; visitors were slipping; need security to cordon area and redirect foot traffic.
After brief morning rain, wet entrance mats led to a patient slip near OPD triage (no fracture). Signage inadequate and housekeeping response slow. Needs QA review of environmental safety controls.
Brief morning rain left the foyer mats soaked; two visitors slipped near the help desk. Need reception to place wet-floor signs, direct people to the side entrance, and call housekeeping immediately.
Brief morning rain dampened cartons of sterile gauze at the external dock. Please inspect/segregate and arrange vendor replacement for compromised packs.
Note counter jammed and EOD variance shows LKR 4,500 short. Kindly reconcile cashbook and authorize write-off/adjustment.
Morning showers delayed two nurse candidates; panel marked them absent. Request HR to reschedule per recruitment policy.
After the morning drizzle, ceiling leak near CT cable tray; water dripping close to power trunking. Area cordoned off.
Main switchboard failed to transfer external calls to ETU extensions after morning maintenance; emergency calls looped back to reception. Require immediate manual rerouting and directory fix.
Basement stores sump pump not cutting in; 2–3 cm water pooling after rain. Request immediate check of pump and float switches.
Two FBC samples from OPD were received with the same CR number due to duplicate ticket issuance. Near-miss averted by technologist; requests QA RCA on patient identification and registration flow.
Yellow clinical waste bags from Ward 7 were left in the black-bin bay; need re-segregation and disinfection of the bay surface immediately.
Inter-facility transfer for NSTEMI to NHSL; ambulance oxygen gauge fluctuating—please swap to ready unit with full cylinders now.
Surgical review patients were directed to the medical clinic queue; the signage at the lobby arrowed to the wrong wing. Please correct wayfinding and announce the change on PA.
Time-sensitive CSF and blood cultures awaiting pickup from Ward 5B; need porter with biohazard cooler to Microbiology immediately.
Locum anaesthetist’s SLMC card shows expiry 31 Dec. Please verify renewal and stand down the booking if not current.
Laundry delivered bedsheets with faint iodine stains and still damp; please rewash and supply clean dry sets for evening admissions.
During weekly genny test, ATS failed to transfer back to CEB mains; manual return required. Inspect ATS controller and interlocks.
Night shift allowance for three staff missing from December payroll. Please correct and confirm adjustment.
Defibrillator self-test showing energy calibration fail; please calibrate and certify before morning rounds.
Oxygen E-type regulators missing fibre washers; risk of leaks with 08:30 OT list. Need urgent issue from Supply.
Induction for new attendants was cancelled due to hall double-booking. Need HR to reschedule today and include safety/harassment briefing before duty.
Perioperative antibiotic prophylaxis given after incision in 3/7 morning cases. Breach of surgical safety bundle; needs QA audit and corrective action with surgical teams.
Post-OGTT patient was given sweetened tea from the ward trolley. Kindly supply unsweetened tea and review diabetic beverage default for OPD holds.
Dispensing label printers in OPD pharmacy are offline after a power cycle; PCs reach HIS but printers look on the wrong VLAN.
Initial insurance verification at reception missed policy numbers for two scheduled day-cases; HIS shows blank insurer fields. Kindly call the insurers and update profiles before admission.
Discharged patient (BHT 23/00145) deposit refund pending despite insurer AIA guarantee on file. Please process balance transfer to guardian today.
Two touts by Main Gate directing OPD patients to private labs; please remove and document with gate book.
Suspected dengue patient discharged from Isolation Cubicle 3; request terminal cleaning with curtain change per protocol before next admission.
LIS to HIS result posting stalled since 05:50; HL7 messages stuck in the outbound queue and wards aren't seeing morning labs.
Biometric unit was moved during repaint; 06:30–07:30 punches not captured. Request HR to regularize attendance for affected staff.
OPD male toilet flush line has very low pressure; multiple pans not clearing. Likely valve/N.R.V. stuck.
Bariatric post-op patient requires transfer from OT recovery to ICU; need bariatric trolley, slide sheet, and at least four porters.
December overtime for theatre orderlies (32 hours) not pulled into payroll. Need Finance/Payroll to add before pay run lock.
60 cm sterile wrap rolls out of stock; staff double-wrapping with 45 cm, slowing turnover. Please expedite issue/local purchase.
Found 14 adrenaline vials close to expiry still on primary shelf; FEFO not followed. NMRA compliance risk; requesting QA-led stock rotation audit and staff refresher.
Ambulance radioed ahead for a collapse case but ETU triage was not alerted by reception, causing a delay on arrival. Please reinforce the red-flag pre-alert protocol with operators.
Relative refused to leave after visiting hours and became loud; require security to de-escalate and clear the bay.
Fire alarm shows intermittent fault in Zone 4 (Paeds); repeater beeping through night. Please trace detector/cabling issue.
OT 2 diathermy unit footswitch sticking intermittently; risk of unintended coagulation, needs inspection and function test before afternoon list.
Vegetarian dhal and fish curry labels were swapped during lunch rush; two staff complained. Need immediate relabel, announce correction, and reinforce color-code SOP.
Oxytocin vials arrived warm; logger shows >8°C for ~30 mins during delivery. Request quarantine and vendor replacement under cold chain breach.
Link to the peripheral clinic dropped during the short rain; rooftop wireless backhaul is flapping and consult was aborted.
IV cannula boxes have barcodes that won’t scan; GS1 not recognized. Distribution/stock update blocked—please rectify with supplier.
UPS in Pathology Lab beeping with high battery temperature alarm after brief rain; need check on fans, batteries, and load to protect analyzers.
Short afternoon rain brought in wet footprints; the OPD token queue extended across the damp foyer. Reception needs to redirect the queue and announce use of the drying mats.
Short rain coincided with POS network drop; five card payments show bank approval but not posted in HMS. Finance to reconcile POS MID and issue receipts.
Patient complaint: token calling skipped numbers and perceived favoritism; waiting time exceeded displayed target by ~90 minutes. Request QA review of queue management and service standards.
Two outpatients arrived at X-ray with eChannelling references but had not completed registration at reception. Please register and issue OPD cards before sending patients to Radiology.
Short spell of rain brought mud into Paediatric corridor from the garden side; floors sticky in patches—please deep mop and clean skirting.
Short rain caused crowd to shelter at ambulance bay, blocking arrival path; request immediate security clearing and traffic control.

Short afternoon rain revealed minor ceiling seep near Radiology waiting area; droplets fell close to an electrical socket. Please initiate QA safety investigation and preventive maintenance follow-up.
Short shower caused skylight leak over dispensing counter; floor wet near shelving. Need sealant and check for cracked pane.
Short rain made main ramp to CT slippery; request transport to reroute and assist wheelchair moves via Ward 2 corridor until dry.
Oxygen cylinder invoice includes new transport surcharge from today; PO not updated, GRN mismatch blocking payment. Request AP to raise debit note/PO amendment.
Short rain delayed BLS recert attendees; HR list marked five as absent. Please grant waiver and schedule a makeup session.
Raw chicken tray stored above cut veg, drip risk noted. Quarantine affected veg and sanitize racks.
OT scheduling module shows a duplicate slot for Theatre 2 at 5 pm after rescheduling; risk of double-booking.
Afternoon shower splashed into loading bay; two glove cartons soaked. Raise damage-in-transit claim and arrange immediate replacements.
DR panel dock shows moisture warning; small roof drip noted near charging bay after short rain. Request drying, inspection, and safety test.
Patient on NBM except meds still received full breakfast (string hoppers + kiri hodi). Please pull back ENT trays and recheck the morning diet list printout.
Glass bottle of syrup shattered near OPD pharmacy counter; need safe glass removal and disinfection of the sticky spill.
Unknown male with backpack accessed CSSD corridor without pass; need security to intercept and verify ID, and secure the door.
Emergency O negative and FFP to Theatre for ruptured ectopic; send cooler, documentation book, and escort now.
Junior nurse reports repeated inappropriate comments by ward clerk. Request HR to initiate formal grievance and assign mediator.
Oxygen outlet at Bed 12 hissing and loose; flowmeter wobbles. Shut valve for now—urgent pipeline check needed.
Background check for new MLT shows NIC mismatch with submitted transcripts. Hold badge until HR verifies credentials.
NICU RH above 65%; AHU-1 filters likely choked and incubators fogging. Please service AHU and verify humidistat.
TPA MedNet Lanka rejected three claims citing ICD-10 code mismatch and missing consultant signature. Finance Claims Team please correct and resubmit.
Ventilator shows flow sensor fault after filter change; please troubleshoot and recalibrate to resume ventilation.
Nepro vanilla is out of stock; three HD patients require evening feeds. Arrange alternative renal formula and update procurement ETA today.
Evening visitor crowd exceeded the two-person rule; several passes were not issued at the desk. Request reception to enforce the pass system and guide overflow to the waiting area.
Patient for first dialysis at 07:30; no functional wheelchair on Ward 7B. Need immediate transfer to Renal Unit.
New dialysis machine delivered; needs commissioning with electrical safety test and RO water interface verification before first patient.
Internal check found several BHTs missing the second identifier label (NIC/hospital ID). Breach of MoH patient identification policy. Needs QA compliance action across wards.
Sharps box near Bed 12 at fill line and no spare in store; please provide replacement and arrange prompt collection of sealed container.
Sterile water 500 ml nearing zero due to weekend surge; buffer miscalculated. Need emergency pull from OT sub-store and urgent PO release.
Visitor filming through NICU viewing window despite signage; security required to stop recording and check visitor pass.
Card payment gateway in HIS is timing out; receipts remain pending while tokens settle later; please check firewall and callbacks.
Returned from maternity leave; no breastfeeding break schedule issued. Need HR to formalize timing per policy.
Persistent foul odour from surgical ward sluice room; request deep clean including drain trap and wall tiles before OT list starts.
Unable to assign the standard MO role during onboarding; the role template is missing after the last HIS update.
Staff lift No.2 intermittently stops with doors half open at Level 1; occurred three times this morning. Needs immediate inspection.
Morning milk delivery recorded at 12°C due to sunny offload delay. Please decide on rejection or rapid chill with documented deviation.
ETF for two HCAs bounced due to EPF number mismatch. Kindly correct HR master data before final payroll run.
CSSD steam sterilizer load: physical parameters met but 2 trays failed chemical integrator. Instruments quarantined. Request immediate QA-led investigation and load recall review.
Neutropenic diet trays had fresh coriander garnish. Kindly replace with plain, no raw herbs, and brief the cook on neutropenic restrictions.
Neonate on CPAP to be shifted ETU→NICU; require transport incubator, portable O2, and trained porter team.
Strong diesel smell at generator day tank; small drip visible at bottom flange. Drip tray placed—please rectify leak.
Bicarbonate concentrate delivered as A-3 instead of A-2. Quarantined batch; request immediate correct supply and vendor swap note.
Ambulance bay blocked by private cars; transport to marshal drivers and reposition fleet—non-emergency transfer due in 10 minutes.
Registration slip carried the wrong age due to NIC DOB entry error; patient was sent to the incorrect fee category. Please correct in HIS and reprint the OPD chit.
ECG trolley earth pin loose; patient reported tingling on metal rail. Need leakage test and plug top replacement.
Request after-hours security escort to quarters; stray dogs and loiterers near Back Gate 2 tonight.
ECG charged twice when patient moved ETU to OPD. Need credit note and LankaQR refund to guardian before discharge.
COVID isolation Room A vacated; terminal clean needed with high-touch disinfection and curtain change before reuse.
Humid afternoon caused fingerprint misreads; many duplicate OUT logs. Please cleanse records and issue guidance on alternate sign-in.
Humid afternoon causing condensation from supply duct near scope cleaning area; floor getting wet. Check insulation and condensate drain.
Lobby queue display started flickering in the humid afternoon and patients crowded the counter for updates. Need manual token announcements and desk marshals until the screen stabilizes.
OPD cards arrived without new clinic numbers and reception stamps, delaying dispensing. Kindly re-stamp and ensure numbers are written at registration.
Incubator humidity control overshooting; condensation inside hood noted in today’s humid conditions. Please recalibrate sensor and check seals.
Complaint: Discharge summary provided only in English; patient requested Sinhala/Tamil as per hospital policy and MoH guidance. QA to review documentation standards and availability of translations.
After the brief evening rain, a drip started over the bakery display; pastry boxes became damp. Need immediate discard of affected items and cordon area.
Radiographer candidate delayed by evening rain; panel closed. Request HR to reschedule to avoid disadvantage.
Evening batch of OT scrub suits smells musty after brief rain; kindly rewash and fast-track drying of 20 sets for night cases.
MRI at 07:30 PM; ortho patient in traction needs vacuum mattress and three porters for safe transfer from 4C.
Portable ultrasound probe intermittently disconnects after shifting between clinics during evening rain; suspect connector pins. Needs inspection.
After brief rain, water seeped from roof gutter into Stair C landing; steps slippery. Clear downpipe and repair flashing.
Evening rain caused minor seepage; some Dec ICU originals damp, QR on bills unreadable. Please regenerate duplicate tax invoices for audit bundle.
Queue dispute escalated during rain; two parties pushing at OPD pharmacy shutter; security needed for crowd control.
Humidity alarm in the server room after the brief evening rain; backup CRAC did not auto-start and sensors need checking.
Evening humidity after brief rain led to wet packs post-ETO cycle aeration; risk of compromised sterility. Need QA to assess environmental controls and revise SOP adherence.
Mother on vegetarian diet requested no onion/garlic per religious vow, but lunch list shows standard veg curry. Please issue a ‘satvik’ variant from today.
Bed transfers done at 08:30 are not visible; ADT feed is delayed and BHT location still shows the old ward.
Unattended parcel found under clinic staircase; please activate security protocol, isolate area, and screen with CCTV review.
Gel electrodes losing adhesion; batch feels dry—likely heat exposure. Need fresher stock and check storage conditions.
Supplier early-payment discount (2%) on sutures invoice lapses tomorrow. AP needs to process today to avail discount.
Barcode scanners at NICU med cabinet fail to read new wristbands; yesterday’s driver push seems incompatible.
During fire drill, Isolation Room 3 maglock did not release on alarm; door remained secured. Immediate fix required.
Five consecutive night duties assigned to same two nurses; staff raised fairness grievance. Need HR-led roster review and mediation.
Halal certification signage not displayed at the chicken counter and utensils were mixed. Require dedicated ladles, signage, and service staff briefing.
Man in civilian clothes tried moving an oxygen cylinder from corridor claiming 'urgent use'; security to stop removal and verify authorisation.
Sepsis pathway activation delayed by ~25 minutes in ETU due to confusion over lab order entry and IV access prioritization. Request QA review of code sepsis SOP and drills.
AC not cooling in A05 under strong sun; request spare ambulance for inter-hospital referral to KDU and schedule repair.
Blood spill on floor near ICU Bed 3 during line insertion; please attend immediately with biohazard protocol and change mop heads after use.
Alcohol hand rub nearly finished in OPD clinics; MSD tender stock still in main store. Please release to OPD before evening clinics.
Theatre 3 anaesthesia gas scavenging monitor not zeroing; likely sensor drift with today’s dry air. Calibrate before morning list.
Several MOs haven’t submitted CPD credits; SLMC renewal due next month. Please arrange catch-up CME and update records.
eChannelling commission deducted twice on seven 14th Jan bookings; my session settlement is short. Finance to review and rectify before Friday.
Chemo carriers warm by midday runs in strong sun; coolant packs insufficient. Request more ice packs and better insulated boxes.
Patients reached Physio without prior registration or payment chits after being waved through by entrance volunteers. Request reception to brief volunteers and direct patients via proper intake.
Noted repeated mains dips; UPS switching frequently. Suspect phase imbalance at Lab MDB—please test and tighten terminations.
OPD entrance auto door shudders and fails to open fully; sensor seems misaligned. Queue forming outside.
Nightly database backup failed two nights; offsite replication lag is 9 hours and needs immediate DR review.
Maternity block NVR is at 98% and not enforcing the 14-day retention after firmware patch; risk of recording halt.
Recall notice for Iohexol 350 (lot F2J...) received. Need Supply to trace and quarantine all units and arrange vendor pickup today.
Two-person assist required to bring hemiplegic patient to rehab gym; current wheelchair footrest broken—please provide replacement and escort.
LankaQR showed success on patient phone (Ref: LQ-17492), but no ledger entry at cashier. Kindly verify with bank and post receipt.
Theatre 1 wall suction weak during list; central vacuum reading low. Kindly check vacuum pumps and pipeline leaks.
Uniform allowance for six attendants still pending. Kindly release and confirm measurements for new issue.
Waste segregation non-compliance: infectious waste mixed in general bin; one uncovered sharps found. Recurrent issue despite training. Request QA enforcement and spot audits.
Category 1 LSCS—move mother to OT immediately; need trolley, lift priority, and corridor clearance.
Overnight calls were misrouted because the ward names changed (Surgical-2 now Ward 6B) but the extension list wasn’t updated. Please refresh the directory and on-call roster at reception.
Autoclave chart recorder not tracing; verify temperature/pressure sensors and recorder before further cycles.
Patient became verbally aggressive and threatened staff over token issue; require security presence to de-escalate.
Hot staff lunch packs were placed on the formula prep bench. Request immediate deep clean and reminder to keep NICU milk area food-free.
CT head TAT for suspected stroke was 55 minutes (KPI ≤30). Delay attributed to porter unavailability and form re-entry. Needs QA process mapping and corrective action.
Povidone-iodine spilled along OT corridor; floor tacky and slippery—need thorough clean before next patient transfer.
Tuna tins expiring next week found at back of shelf, not FIFO. Please adjust menu to rotate stock or arrange return before lapse.
Loose roof tiles above ambulance bay walkway rattling; one tile shifted and may fall. Please secure before night.
2025 performance appraisal forms for nursing cadre not circulated; timelines at risk. HR to issue forms and brief appraisers.
Fire panel shows ground fault on Zone 7 (Records Store) after damp morning; buzzer silenced, fault persists. Inspect loop/wiring.
After the noon patch, HIS is issuing duplicate receipt numbers in OPD; finance tallies are off and need a hotfix.
OPD general waste trolley had two yellow clinical bags mixed in; please re-segregate and disinfect trolley handle surfaces.
Two attendants complain of verbal abuse by shift supervisor. Request HR inquiry and counseling intervention.
Dry ice vendor missed evening drop; plasma transfer pending to Teaching Hospital. Need emergency supply via alternate vendor.
Walk-in chiller temp rose to 9°C due to frequent door openings; raw fish trays affected. Need discard decision and temp recovery plan.
Entry mats at ETU remain damp and smell after morning showers; request replacement with dry mats and floor disinfection.
Morning showers pooling at rear gate; ambulance 24 needs alternative exit and escort for STEMI pickup at Moratuwa clinic.
Low-salt breakfast arrived with regular parippu; two hypertensive patients flagged. Kindly recall the batch and send renal/low-sodium replacements.
Post-appendectomy patient deteriorating; urgent transfer to radiology for ultrasound—porter team delayed 30 minutes.
Drizzle from umbrellas left wet patch at CT entrance; request immediate mopping and placement of caution signage.
Morning drizzle delayed staff buses; 11 OPD staff marked late/absent. Please apply grace as per policy and amend times.
Bedside monitors lost network to central station twice during the morning rain; PoE switch shows power issues.
Self-seal autoclave pouches not adhering reliably after morning humidity/rain. Request alternate brand stock and immediate issue.
Light rain crowded the entrance canopy and a vendor set up an umbrella stall inside the foyer. Reception needs to check vendor permission and relocate them outside the patient flow.
Fire exit by ICU blocked with oxygen cylinder trolleys moved indoors due to rain. Immediate life-safety violation. Request QA escalation and disciplinary action per policy.
Morning light rain caused damp OPD triage corridor; multiple near-slips reported, signage late. Request QA-led environmental safety risk assessment and wet weather protocol.
Light rain tracked into lobby making floor slick; need security to place cones, manage entry flow, and prevent falls.
Morning rain delayed cheque courier; risk of missing bank 3 PM cut-off for salary funding. Request approval to use online transfer as backup.
Bedside monitor SpO2 channel flatlines intermittently since morning drizzle; probable moisture in extension cable. Request replacement/check.
Light rain this morning; water seeping along basement corridor to CSSD. Pump alarm lit and floor wet—request immediate action.
Caller reported an RTA inbound but was kept on hold during line transfer; ETU received the alert three minutes late. Please prioritise emergency lines at switchboard.
Three-wheelers (tuk-tuks) parked under canopy to avoid rain are blocking emergency ingress; immediate security clearance required.
Vaccine fridge excursion to 11.2°C for ~50 minutes during rush; door repeatedly opened. Cold chain breach suspected. QA required for excursion handling and potential wastage assessment.
Main theatre isolation transformer alarm for high leakage current after damp morning; urgent insulation and earth continuity testing needed.
Chemmaster hasn’t been paid since Nov; they are holding disinfectant delivery. AP to clear pending GRN invoices urgently to avoid stockout.
High clinic crowd; vegetarian counter sold out by 12:05 PM. Request rapid batch of red rice + pumpkin curry and adjust forecast for Tuesdays.
TB PCR specimens must reach reference lab within 60 minutes; assign dedicated driver and Category B biohazard cooler.
New patient monitors from MSD lack EtCO2 as per spec; request Biomed evaluation and advice on acceptance or return.
Relative wandered over an hour searching for Ward 4 due to faded signage; the map handed out at reception was outdated. Request updated printouts and an escort system for first-time visitors.
Infant tag alarm triggered (Code Pink) at SCBU entry; require full security response to lock exits and verify all bracelets; likely strap dislodgement.
Audit shows missing tramadol vials from controlled cupboard; please seal area, check access logbook, and review CCTV.
Agency nurse contracts end this week; renewal letters pending. Risk of weekend gaps—please extend or arrange locums.
Cash receipt for discharge bill printed with wrong guardian name. Please cancel and reissue correct invoice to close the file today.
Ward 5 AHU tripped twice around noon; ward became very warm. Check condenser coil and filters ASAP.
TENS units due for annual calibration and safety testing; please schedule preventive maintenance.
Child on vegetarian diet was served egg curry. Please correct diet card coding and send veg protein alternative (soya or dhal).
Three 1L saline bags cracked—likely from a broken pallet. Please inspect full lot and replace; ward on last carton.
Pigeon droppings on ramp rail and wheelchair bay; kindly clean and disinfect, and liaise with pest control through your team.
Heparin infusion documented on nursing chart without a signed MO order in BHT; verbal order confusion noted. Needs QA review of medication authorization and documentation standards.
Audit found expired AED pads and missing suction tubing in ambulance A03; pull from roster and restock, then document readiness.
PACS viewer lags 20–30 seconds when scrolling MR series; local cache bypassed and Radiology VLAN QoS seems low.
EPF/ETF bank e-submission file rejected due to new format. Need Payroll to regenerate and submit before statutory deadline.
Nappy and clinical bins not cleared at 02:00 as per schedule; odour building in SCBU—please collect with double-bagging.
Only one OPD counter opened at morning rush; tokens were not issued by time slot and the line blocked wheelchair passage. Please open an extra counter and marshal the queue.
Feed water pressure to RO plant low; pre-filter differential high. Please clean/replace strainers and verify inlet line.
Probation confirmations for three new MOs pending >6 months; they can’t apply for PGIM rotations. Kindly expedite letters.
N95 mask rate contract lapsed; supplier holding stock. Request urgent PO extension and bridge order to resume deliveries.
Post-duty escort requested to staff car park; group of youths loitering near Gate 3.
Lunch HACCP log incomplete; probe thermometer overdue for calibration sticker. Food safety documentation gap—request QA compliance audit and corrective plan.
Outdated consent form version (pre-2024) found in Ward 5 drawer and used for one minor procedure. Requires QA action on document control and removal of obsolete forms.
Token confusion among walk-in donors turned into verbal clash; security requested to mediate and maintain order.
Vicryl 2-0 unavailable; received 3-0 instead. Tonight’s list needs 2-0—request inter-ward loan and fast-track correct supply.
Two trauma referrals en route simultaneously; require second ambulance crew, spine boards, and triage bay prepared.
NBM patient given a cup of plain tea from the snack trolley while waiting for theatre. Request route change for trolley and bold ‘NBM Zone’ signage.
New HCA batch without photo IDs—entry disputes at gates and ETU. Please issue ID cards and update access list.
Blood bank refrigerator showing temp fluctuations and alarms overnight; request sensor calibration and condenser coil cleaning.
Crossmatch label timestamps are 10 minutes ahead of LIS; the workstation is not syncing with NTP, affecting traceability.
Intercom from reception to Paediatrics is not connecting; external calls cannot be transferred to our duty room. Need manual call patching and a fault report logged by switchboard.
Wind swung main gate barrier arm and struck a staff car mirror; need security to control gate, record details, and guide traffic.
IP phone in OT 2 is not registering; anaesthesia calls fail and the voice VLAN DHCP scope may be exhausted.
Corporate client People’s Leasing has exceeded credit limit; today’s sessions on hold. AR to approve temporary extension or request prepayment.
Mop heads stored wet in corridor closet; risk of contamination—please launder/replace and sanitize the storage buckets and area.
Corporate admission pending because reception has not secured the Letter of Guarantee; patient is waiting in the lounge. Kindly call HR and the insurer to confirm LOG and update HIS.
Platelets for Ward 6 Oncology need hand-carry; send temp-controlled carrier and immediate porter escort.
Visitor tailgated through access-controlled ICU door during shift change; security to identify via CCTV and enforce pass checks.
Analyzer QC for K+ out-of-range; 12 patient results auto-released before hold applied. Potential clinical impact. Request QA-led incident investigation and clinician notification protocol.
Yellow clinical waste bags (50 micron) nearly out in ICU/ETU; reorder level not triggered. Need urgent issue today.
CT injector footswitch unresponsive; contrast list at 1 pm. Need immediate repair or a loaner unit.
Two community volunteers placed at registration lack police clearance/reference checks. Pause deployment until HR completes vetting.
Dysphagia orders for Ward 6 require IDDSI Level 2, but lunch jellies arrived Level 3. Please reissue fluids at correct thickness and update prep guide.
Pantry sink overflowed with food debris; water spreading across floor—need immediate clean-up, disinfection, and wet-floor signage (maintenance ticket raised).
ETU defibrillator pads connector latch broken; require connector repair and advice on compatible pad stock.
January OPD petty cash floats not replenished; counters short of change causing queues. Finance please top-up and update logbook.
Rehab module access removed after role cleanup; therapists cannot document sessions and need permission mapping.
Vendor lorry delivered implants after-hours without gate pass. Please enforce delivery window per contract and notify supplier.
Misty morning condensation noted on portable X-ray detector; wiped and delayed start by 10 minutes. Seeking QA guidance on pre-use checks and EHS for early shifts.
CT brain 07:30; drowsy patient requires oxygen and head support during move—assign trained porter and monitor.
Morning mist led to condensation; gotukola bundles arrived wilted and slimy at the cores. Need partial rejection and switch to mallung with cabbage.
Misty morning caused condensation on the entrance glass and the vaccine clinic sign was hard to read; guardians crowded the help desk. Request temporary floor arrows and a PA announcement.
February duty roster posted with <24 hrs notice; staff can’t arrange swaps. Request HR to enforce 7-day notice and retrain NOICs.
Unlicensed vendor selling herbal oils in OPD queue; please remove and note in occurrence book.
Light rain led to muddy shoe prints across registration hall; require continuous mopping until footfall reduces.
Suture consignment delayed; courier reports rain-related road closures. Need Supply to arrange direct pickup or alternate vendor for tonight’s emergencies.
Light rain turned ambulance wash bay muddy; gurney wheels clogging. Request transport to shift decontamination to covered area and clean.
Wet ramp from afternoon rain caused soup urn to slip during Ward 3 delivery; minor spill. Request anti-slip mats on trolley route and replace spilled portions.
Central oxygen blender alarm for low inlet pressure though pipeline normal; possible internal filter damp due to today’s rain; please inspect.
QR scanner  is jammed; two LankaQR amounts keyed manually don’t match bank confirmations. Need reconciliation and adjustment entries.
OPD token displays flicker and reboot during the afternoon light rain; the UPS is beeping and the switch keeps restarting.
Patient fall outside clinic where floor was wet from umbrellas during afternoon rain; minor abrasion treated. QA to open adverse event and review mats/signage/attendant allocation.
